    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BookingSystem.addClassroom(int id, String name, int capacity)
    Adds a new classroom (Admin only).
    void
    BookingSystem.bookClassroom(User user, int classroomId, String date, String timeSlot)
    Books a classroom for a user.
    void
    BookingSystem.cancelBooking(Person actor, int bookingId)
    Cancels an existing booking.
    void
    DatabaseManager.deleteBooking(int bookingId)
    Deletes a booking from the database.
    void
    BookingSystem.deleteClassroom(int id)
    Deletes a classroom and all its bookings (Admin only).
    void
    DatabaseManager.deleteClassroom(int id)
    Deletes a classroom from the database.
    ArrayList<Booking>
    DatabaseManager.loadBookings(ArrayList<Person> allUsers, ArrayList<Classroom> allClassrooms)
    Loads all bookings from the database.
    ArrayList<Classroom>
    DatabaseManager.loadClassrooms()
    Loads all classrooms from the database.
    ArrayList<Person>
    DatabaseManager.loadUsers()
    Loads all users from the database.
    Person
    BookingSystem.login(String email, String password)
    Logs in a user with email and password.
    void
    BookingSystem.register(String name, String email, String password)
    Registers a new user account.
    int
    DatabaseManager.saveBooking(String userEmail, int classroomId, String date, String timeSlot)
    Saves a new booking to the database.
    void
    DatabaseManager.saveClassroom(Classroom c)
    Saves a classroom to the database.
    void
    DatabaseManager.saveUser(String name, String email, String password, String role)
    Saves a new user to the database.
    void
    BookingSystem.updateClassroom(int id, String newName, int newCapacity)
    Updates a classroom's name and capacity (Admin only).
